description_long: This is a rectangular, open-top trash bin with a slightly flared rim and a dark, matte body. The bin appears to be made of sturdy plastic, with a visible recycling symbol embossed on the front, indicating its intended use for recyclable materials. The rim is textured and shows signs of wear and grime, suggesting frequent use in an outdoor or urban environment. Inside the bin, there are visible discarded items, including a crumpled red can and other small pieces of trash. The overall color scheme is dark blue to black with a grayish rim, and the surface has a slightly glossy, worn finish. The bin lacks any visible handles or wheels, and there is no lid, making it easily accessible for public use.
description: A rectangular, open-top plastic trash bin with a flared, worn rim and a recycling symbol on the front. The bin is dark blue-black with a gray rim and contains visible trash inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recycling symbol and a red can inside the bin.
description_view_1: Side view with a clear look at the flared rim and no visible signage.
description_view_2: Rear view with more grime on the rim and a blue item visible inside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the red can and worn rim, no signage visible.
